options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Thank you for your message. I look forward to connecting with you when you return to Chicago. Please feel free to reach out at that time, and we can discuss further. I appreciate you staying in touch.

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Nice! Can't wait to catch up when you're back in Chicago. Let me know when you get in and we can grab coffee or something. It'll be fun to hang out!

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Sounds good! Hit me up when you're back and we'll meet up.
